content.css: .navigation.tabs-top.main { display: flex !important; flex-wrap: nowrap !important; overflow-x: auto !important; overflow-y: hidden !important; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; scrollbar-width: thin;}.navigation.tabs-top.main > .tablink { flex: 1 1 120px !important; min-width: 120px !important; box-sizing: border-box;}

widgets.css: .nodes.inputs, .nodes.outputs { width: 30%; flex: 0 0 30%; } canvas { flex: 1 1 auto; } .patchbaynode-container { white-space: normal; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; height: auto; min-height: var(--line-height); } .patchbaynode-container > label { white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word; text-overflow: clip; }

widgets.label: snap all spot pos to bpm

widgets.onTouch: if (locals.touching) { locals.touching = false; send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_reds/record", 0) } else { locals.touching = true; send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_reds/record", 1); set("loop_reds_origin", value) }

var t = getVar('this', 'touching'); if (t) { setVar('this', 'touching', false); send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/record", 0) } else { setVar('this', 'touching', true); send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/record", 1); set("loop_spot_pos_1_origin", get("gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/input")) }

var t = getVar('this', 'touching'); if (t) { setVar('this', 'touching', false); send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/record", 0) } else { setVar('this', 'touching', true); send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/record", 1); set("loop_spot_pos_2_origin", get("gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/input")) }
